---
title: "alfred_observer.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\engine\alfred_observer.py"
loc: 37
complexity: 10
logic_score: 2.35
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.50
---

## Intent
The `alfred_observer.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on AlfredObserver, __init__, observe_fishtest, observe_sentinel, _append_observation. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via AlfredObserver, __init__, observe_fishtest, observe_sentinel, _append_observation. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `AlfredObserver`
- `__init__`
- `observe_fishtest`
- `observe_sentinel`
- `_append_observation`
